generated_exposure.exposure_text: Our allies are taking advantage of us. While we're over here securing borders and funding defense, they're cutting their own budgets and expecting us to carry the load. Remember when NATO partners promised to meet their 2% spending targets? Only a handful actually do. Meanwhile, our tax dollars go to protecting nations that won't even protect themselves. It's time to put America first - demand accountability from these freeloaders or start rethinking our commitments. #NationalSecurity #AllianceBurden
